Theorem con2d 134
Description: A contraposition deduction. (Contributed by NM, 19-Aug-1993.)
Hypothesis
Ref Expression
con2d.1 ⊢ (𝜑 → (𝜓 → ¬ 𝜒))
Assertion
Ref Expression
con2d ⊢ (𝜑 → (𝜒 → ¬ 𝜓))
Proof of Theorem con2d
StepHypRef Expression
1 notnotr 130 . . 3 ⊢ (¬ ¬ 𝜓 → 𝜓)
2 con2d.1 . . 3 ⊢ (𝜑 → (𝜓 → ¬ 𝜒))
31, 2syl5 34 . 2 ⊢ (𝜑 → (¬ ¬ 𝜓 → ¬ 𝜒))
43con4d 115 1 ⊢ (𝜑 → (𝜒 → ¬ 𝜓))
Colors of variables: wff setvar class
Syntax hints:  ¬ wn 3   → wi 4
